metadata.description: Personal collection of Claude Code and Cursor skills

plugins.name: k8s-error-analyzer-skill
plugins.description: Analyze Kubernetes pod failures by reading logs, identifying errors, and generating detailed error analysis reports.

plugins.name: k8s-optimizer-cost-skill
plugins.description: Analyze cost efficiency and right-size Kubernetes workloads in a namespace using 7-day Datadog metrics and PerfectScale-style policy-driven recommendations.

plugins.name: create-runbook-skill
plugins.description: Promote recurring triage notes into living runbooks under ops/runbooks/ with automatic backlinks.

plugins.name: datadog-triage-skill
plugins.description: End-to-end Datadog triage orchestrator. Plans the investigation, delegates to service-health / logs / metrics sub-skills, and produces a consolidated report + master Datadog notebook.

plugins.name: datadog-service-health-skill
plugins.description: APM-centric health check for a Datadog service: latency p50/p95/p99, error rate, throughput, traces, dependencies, monitor coverage.

plugins.name: datadog-logs-analyzer-skill
plugins.description: Datadog logs investigation via pattern clustering, attribute discovery, and DDSQL aggregations; produces a triage report with evidence deep-links.

plugins.name: datadog-metrics-investigator-skill
plugins.description: Datadog metric spike / anomaly investigation: metadata discovery, sliced timeseries, baseline comparison, existing dashboard reuse, Cloud Cost support.

plugins.name: datadog-report-publisher-skill
plugins.description: Shared publisher for the Datadog skill suite: writes an Obsidian-friendly Markdown artefact AND a linked Datadog Notebook with embedded widgets.
